baseline_summary: The baseline already keeps the nomination flow locally bundled and trace-consistent, but its tidy packaging can still make the case feel more complete than the explicit review boundaries warrant.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked medium framing risk, challenge outcome narrowed, and 1 ledger entry captured why tidy bundle packaging can look more authoritative than it is.

comparison_axes.reason: Both tracks keep the case inside a bounded local bundle frame.
Delta more explicitly guards against treating package polish as broader authority.
Delta is better at resisting closure borrowed from tidy review packaging.
Delta better highlights where evidence completeness is being inferred from structure.
Both tracks still produce a usable bounded review package after the caution is made explicit.
